data_description.phase_count: Number of phases on your meter

entities.title: Source Entities
entities.description: Select the Zigbee2MQTT sensor entities from your energy meter device. Open your Z2M device page and find the corresponding entities below.

data_description.energy_entity: Total energy consumed sensor. In Zigbee2MQTT it is usually named 'energy' (e.g. sensor.meter_energy). It shows cumulative kWh.
data_description.power_entity: Current power draw sensor. In Zigbee2MQTT it is usually named 'power' (e.g. sensor.meter_power). It shows real-time watts.
data_description.voltage_a_entity: Voltage on Phase A. In Zigbee2MQTT it is usually named 'voltage_a' or just 'voltage' for single-phase meters (e.g. sensor.meter_voltage_a).
data_description.voltage_b_entity: Voltage on Phase B. In Zigbee2MQTT it is usually named 'voltage_b' (e.g. sensor.meter_voltage_b). Only for 2- and 3-phase meters.
data_description.voltage_c_entity: Voltage on Phase C. In Zigbee2MQTT it is usually named 'voltage_c' (e.g. sensor.meter_voltage_c). Only for 3-phase meters.

dual_tariff.title: Dual Tariff Settings
dual_tariff.description: Configure day/night tariff rates and schedule

initial_readings.title: Meter Readings
initial_readings.description: Enter the current readings from your physical meter and the readings from your last submitted report

data_description.initial_day: What your physical meter shows now for day tariff
data_description.initial_night: What your physical meter shows now for night tariff
data_description.initial_total: What your physical meter shows now (total)
data_description.last_report_day: Day reading from your last submitted electricity bill
data_description.last_report_night: Night reading from your last submitted electricity bill
data_description.last_report_total: Total reading from your last submitted electricity bill

outages.title: Planned Outages
outages.description: Configure Yasno planned outage schedule display (optional)

data_description.yasno_city: Select your city for outage schedule
data_description.yasno_group: Your outage group (e.g. 1.1). Find it on yasno.com.ua or in the Yasno app
